name: Cinnamon Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients with a hand mixer until well combined. Set aside in the refrigerator.
2. Take 1 sandwich loaf of white bread, cut off the crusts, and flatten each piece with a rolling pin. Spread with the cream cheese mixture.
3. Roll up each flattened piece of bread. Combine the cinnamon, butter, and sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Dip each rollup in the cinnamon mixture, ensuring it is evenly coated on all sides.
5. Place the rollups seam side down on an 9 x 13 pan with sides.
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Remove from the baking pan and allow to cool completely before serving. Best enjoyed chilled.
